narrative:
Groveport-B (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,136 registered voters, with 56.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.9%, a modest Republican lean of 5.7 percentage points.
